zh.Newham, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾紐哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Bodrugan於大約1372年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Ralph Trenoweth55歲，母親Joan Bodrugan23歲。他於大約1397年與Johanna Bodrugan在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1416年享年45歲。

zh-hans.Newham, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾紐哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Bodrugan于大约1372年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Ralph Trenoweth55岁，母亲Joan Bodrugan23岁。他于大约1397年与Johanna Bodrugan在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1416年享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When William Bodrugan was born about 1372, in Devon, England, his father, Ralph Trenoweth, was 55 and his mother, Joan Bodrugan, was 23. He married Johanna Bodrugan about 1397, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1416, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Bodrugan est né environ 1372, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Trenoweth, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Joan Bodrugan, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Bodrugan environ 1397, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1416, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Bodrugan um 1372 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Trenoweth 55 und seine Mutter Joan Bodrugan 23. Er hat um 1397 in England Johanna Bodrugan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1416 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Bodrugan è nato il circa 1372 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Ralph Trenoweth, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Joan Bodrugan, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Bodrugan circa 1397, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1416, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bodruganが約1372年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Ralph Trenowethは55歳，母Joan Bodruganは23歳であった。約1397年にイギリスでJohanna Bodruganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1416年に45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Bodrugan(이)가 대략 1372년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Trenoweth(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Bodrugan(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1397년 영국에서 Johanna Bodrugan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1416년 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Newham, Cornwall, England: Newham, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Bodrugan nasceu aproximadamente 1372, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Trenoweth, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Joan Bodrugan, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Bodrugan aproximadamente 1397, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1416, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Bodrugan родился около 1372 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Trenoweth было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Bodrugan, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Bodrugan около 1397 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1416 г. в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Bodrugan nació aproximadamente 1372, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Trenoweth, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Joan Bodrugan, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Johanna Bodrugan aproximadamente 1397, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1416, a la edad de 45 años.
